name: ai-portfolio
title: MCP Terminal Portfolio - yubi.sh
summary: Interactive AI-powered portfolio where visitors explore projects, skills, and experience through a terminal-style conversational interface.
proud_reason: This is the flagship personal portfolio project because it turns a static portfolio into a natural conversation, combining a terminal UI, LLM-backed answers, voice interaction, MCP tooling, streaming responses, and production observability.
impact: It demonstrates end-to-end product thinking across frontend UX, backend AI orchestration, real-time voice, deployment, and cost-aware reliability controls.
